description: Built an internal MLOps platform supporting 35+ production models monthly with a 99.5% deployment success rate across Databricks and AKS.
Fine-tuned an LLM on Vertex AI to convert Skyspark code into a custom DSL, achieving 80%+ translation accuracy.
Automated model packaging and container deployment using Shell, FastAPI and AKS, reducing deploy time from 3 days to 30 minutes for 15+ data scientists.
Integrated 5 security scanners (Coverity, ModelScan, TwistLock, Malware, BlackDuckHub) into CI/CD pipeline, catching 40+ vulnerabilities pre-deployment.
Built and deployed large-scale data pipelines using PySpark and Databricks to process 500K+ service tickets and 10K+ PDF documents weekly, powering AI chatbot for 10+ enterprise customers.
Created automated PDF parsing system using PySpark and PyMuPDF to extract data from technical manuals and schematics with 95% accuracy, eliminating manual data entry.
Improved data pipeline efficiency by 70% with automated quality checks and schema validation, cutting ML team's development time from weeks to days.
